title: function name 'expire_stale_sessions_before' no longer matches its parameter semantics
description: What is awkward: the name expire_stale_sessions_before implies the second argument is a reference point ('before cutoff'), but it is now a duration ('older than N seconds'). A reader seeing expire_stale_sessions_before(now_ts, 24*3600) has to read the docstring to understand that 24*3600 is a max_age, not a timestamp. The original name fit the old cutoff: i64 API. Suggested rename: expire_sessions_older_than(now_ts: i64, max_age_secs: u64) — reads naturally as 'expire sessions older than 24*3600 seconds'.
